summary.en: Developer-friendly, enterprise-grade hosted search and discovery API for websites and apps.
summary.zh: 為網站與應用程式打造、對開發者友善的企業級代管搜尋與探索 API。

highlight.en: One of YC's standout European exports, Algolia powers search for thousands of companies like Stripe, Twitch and Under Armour, handling tens of billions of queries a month. It raised $150M in 2021 at a $2.25B valuation and reportedly hit ~$100M ARR.
highlight.zh: Algolia 是 YC 最亮眼的歐洲新創之一,為 Stripe、Twitch、Under Armour 等數千家公司提供搜尋功能,每月處理數百億次查詢。2021 年以 22.5 億美元估值募資 1.5 億美元,年經常性收入據報達約 1 億美元。

funding.zh: 最後估值約 22.5 億美元(2021 年);累計募資約 3.34 億美元

sources.title: Search API startup Algolia raises $150 million at $2.25 billion valuation

summary.en: End-to-end property management platform for the short-term and vacation rental industry.
summary.zh: 服務短期與度假租賃產業的端到端物業管理平台。

highlight.en: Guesty became the category leader for managing Airbnb, Booking.com and other listings from one platform, raising over $400M across its rounds. Its 2024 Series F brought in $130M at a ~$900M valuation, just shy of unicorn status, with KKR leading.
highlight.zh: Guesty 成為從單一平台管理 Airbnb、Booking.com 等房源的類別領導者,各輪累計募資逾 4 億美元。2024 年 F 輪由 KKR 領投,募得 1.3 億美元、估值約 9 億美元,僅差一步未達獨角獸門檻。

funding.en: Last valued ~$900M (2024 Series F, KKR-led); raised ~$409M total
funding.zh: 最後估值約 9 億美元(2024 年 F 輪,KKR 領投);累計募資約 4.09 億美元

summary.en: AI-powered customer communication, engagement and payments platform for healthcare practices.
summary.zh: 為醫療診所打造、由 AI 驅動的客戶溝通、互動與支付平台。

highlight.en: Weave is one of YC's clearest IPO success stories, threading together communication, scheduling and payments for small healthcare businesses. It went public on the NYSE (WEAV) in November 2021, raising about $120M at an implied ~$1.8B valuation.
highlight.zh: Weave 是 YC 最明確的 IPO 成功案例之一,為小型醫療業者整合溝通、預約與支付。公司於 2021 年 11 月在紐約證交所掛牌(代號 WEAV),募資約 1.2 億美元,隱含估值約 18 億美元。

funding.en: IPO Nov 2021 on NYSE (WEAV), raised ~$120M; market cap ~$0.4-0.5B
funding.zh: 2021 年 11 月於紐約證交所 IPO(代號 WEAV),募資約 1.2 億美元;市值約 4-5 億美元

founders: Brandon Rodman, Clint Berry, Jared Rodman, Marcus Bertilson

summary.en: Nonprofit that trains patients' families in high-impact health skills to improve outcomes and save lives.
summary.zh: 訓練病患家屬掌握高影響力照護技能,藉以改善治療成效並挽救生命的非營利組織。

highlight.en: Noora Health turns family members into a powerful untapped care resource, having trained over 30 million caregivers across more than 12,400 facilities in India, Bangladesh, Indonesia and Nepal. In 2022 it was named a TED Audacious Project grantee and won the Skoll Award, cutting cardiac surgery complications by 71%.
highlight.zh: Noora Health 將家屬轉化為被低估的強大照護資源,已在印度、孟加拉、印尼與尼泊爾逾 12,400 家機構訓練超過 3,000 萬名照護者。2022 年獲選為 TED Audacious Project 受贈者並榮獲 Skoll 獎,使心臟手術併發症降低 71%。

funding.en: Nonprofit; TED Audacious Project grantee and Skoll Award winner (2022)
funding.zh: 非營利組織;2022 年 TED Audacious Project 受贈者暨 Skoll 獎得主

sources.title: Edith Elliott and Shahed Alam: The most powerful untapped resource in health care | TED

summary.en: AI-centric Language Operations platform combining machine translation with human-in-the-loop quality.
summary.zh: 以 AI 為核心的語言營運平台,結合機器翻譯與人工把關品質。

highlight.en: Unbabel built a LangOps platform serving brands like Microsoft, LEGO and Booking.com, raising roughly $91M before its exit. In 2025 it was acquired by TransPerfect, the world's largest translation company, capping its YC-backed journey.
highlight.zh: Unbabel 打造的 LangOps 平台服務 Microsoft、LEGO、Booking.com 等品牌,在退場前累計募資約 9,100 萬美元。2025 年被全球最大翻譯公司 TransPerfect 收購,為其 YC 出身的歷程畫下句點。

funding.zh: 累計募資約 9,100 萬美元;2025 年被 TransPerfect 收購

founders: Vasco Pedro, Joao Graca, Sofia Pessanha, Bruno Silva, Hugo Silva

sources.title: Vasco Pedro - Co-founder and CEO - Unbabel

summary.en: Builds multi-party data infrastructure and automation for major financial institutions and capital markets.
summary.zh: 為大型金融機構與資本市場打造多方資料基礎設施與自動化工具。

highlight.en: Axoni became a key capital-markets infrastructure provider backed by Deutsche Bank, UBS and Intel, raising about $110M in total. In 2024 it sold its Veris post-trade processing business to the London Stock Exchange Group.
highlight.zh: Axoni 成為由德意志銀行、UBS 與 Intel 支持的關鍵資本市場基礎設施供應商,累計募資約 1.1 億美元。2024 年將其 Veris 交易後處理業務出售予倫敦證券交易所集團(LSEG)。

funding.en: Raised ~$110M total; sold Veris business to LSEG (2024)
funding.zh: 累計募資約 1.1 億美元;2024 年將 Veris 業務出售予 LSEG

founders: Greg Schvey, Jeffrey Schvey, Rajeev Gopalakrishna, Pradeep Banavara

sources.title: Axoni sells Veris post-trade processing business to LSEG

summary.en: Femtech wellness brand making design-led, tech-powered products and subscriptions for women's health.
summary.zh: 以設計為導向的女性科技健康品牌,打造科技驅動的產品與訂閱服務。

highlight.en: Bellabeat grew into a go-to women's wellness brand built around its Leaf and Ivy wearables, expanding internationally. It pioneered hyper-personalized, holistic wellness offerings aligned with the menstrual cycle.
highlight.zh: Bellabeat 以 Leaf 與 Ivy 穿戴裝置為核心,成長為女性健康的指標品牌並拓展至國際市場。它率先推出貼合月經週期的超個人化整體健康方案。

summary.en: Subscription meal-kit service delivering personalized 10-minute, one-pan gourmet dinner kits.
summary.zh: 提供個人化、10 分鐘一鍋上桌的美味晚餐套組訂閱服務。

highlight.en: Gobble differentiated in the crowded meal-kit space with chef-engineered, pre-chopped one-pan dinners cookable in under 10 minutes. The company was acquired, capping its run as a YC-backed consumer brand.
highlight.zh: Gobble 在競爭激烈的餐包市場中,以主廚設計、預先處理、10 分鐘內可完成的一鍋晚餐做出區隔。公司後來被收購,結束其 YC 出身消費品牌的歷程。

summary.en: Cuts corporate travel costs by rewarding employees who book trips below a smart, policy-aware budget.
summary.zh: 透過獎勵員工在符合政策的智慧預算內訂行程,為企業降低差旅成本。

highlight.en: Rocketrip pioneered behavioral incentives for business travel, sharing savings with employees who beat algorithmically set budgets. In 2020 it was acquired by travel marketplace Mondee.
highlight.zh: Rocketrip 開創了商務差旅的行為激勵模式,將節省下的成本與在演算法預算內省錢的員工分享。2020 年被旅遊平台 Mondee 收購。

sources.title: Mondee Holdings acquires business travel technology startup Rocketrip

summary.en: OpenFeature-native feature flag management platform built for developers, formerly Taplytics.
summary.zh: 為開發者打造、原生支援 OpenFeature 的功能旗標管理平台,前身為 Taplytics。

highlight.en: Born at YC as Taplytics in 2011 for A/B testing, the company evolved into DevCycle, a developer-first feature management platform serving billions of events. In January 2026 it was acquired by Dynatrace to add runtime feature controls to its observability suite.
highlight.zh: 公司 2011 年以 Taplytics 之名於 YC 起步、專注 A/B 測試,後轉型為以開發者為先的功能管理平台 DevCycle,處理數十億次事件。2026 年 1 月被 Dynatrace 收購,為其可觀測性套件加入執行期功能控制。

funding.zh: 2026 年 1 月被 Dynatrace 收購

founders: Aaron Glazer, Andrew Norris, Jonathan Norris, Cobi Druxerman

sources.title: YC alum DevCycle bought by Dynatrace

summary.en: Curated office catering service delivering dietitian-vetted meals from top local restaurants.
summary.zh: 由營養師把關、精選頂尖在地餐廳餐點的辦公室外燴服務。

highlight.en: Zesty built tailored corporate food programs for offices of 20 to 1,000+ employees, raising over $20M from investors like Index Ventures and Founders Fund. The YC-backed company was later acquired.
highlight.zh: Zesty 為 20 至 1,000 人以上規模的辦公室打造客製化企業餐飲方案,獲 Index Ventures、Founders Fund 等投資人挹注逾 2,000 萬美元。這家 YC 出身的公司後來被收購。

funding.en: Raised over $20M (Index Ventures, Founders Fund, others)
funding.zh: 募資逾 2,000 萬美元(Index Ventures、Founders Fund 等)

summary.en: India's fintech SaaS platform for tax filing, invoices, GST, wealth management and credit.
summary.zh: 印度的金融科技 SaaS 平台,提供報稅、發票、GST、財富管理與信貸服務。

highlight.en: Clear (formerly ClearTax) was India's first YC-funded company (2014) and grew into a leading fintech serving millions of Indian businesses and taxpayers. It has raised about $140M, reaching a valuation reported at over $700M, backed by Founders Fund and Sequoia.
highlight.zh: Clear(前身為 ClearTax)是印度首家獲 YC 投資的公司(2014 年),成長為服務數百萬印度企業與納稅人的領先金融科技公司。累計募資約 1.4 億美元,估值據報逾 7 億美元,獲 Founders Fund 與 Sequoia 支持。

funding.zh: 最後估值逾 7 億美元;累計募資約 1.4 億美元

founders: Archit Gupta, Srivatsan Chari, Ankit Solanki
